assumptions: Ra=100Ω target accepted from engineer input; calc.electrode_resistance tool call pending runtime support per WI3.
Rod electrode formula treats rods as semi-infinite (validated by post-install measurement).

flags: TOOL-CALL-PENDING:calc.zs_loop_impedance — Zs values are LLM-estimates; deterministic refinement deferred per WI3.

rationale.chat_summary: TT earthing for a rural Tuscany cottage. No DNO earth available — two 1.5 m rods in parallel give a target Ra ≤ 100Ω. MET in NW intake cupboard; main 10 mm² bond to the LPG fuel pipe. Three circuits, all 30 mA RCBO-protected (IEC 60364 411.5.3). Soil 100 Ω·m assumed; tool-call pending for live Ra calc. Reply to refine, e.g. 'add a rod for ≤50Ω target'.

sections.title: Earthing System
sections.summary: TT confirmed because no DNO earth is available at this rural location. Per IEC 60364-1 clause 312.2, TT requires consumer-provided electrode and RCD-based ADS.

decisions.label: TT system confirmed
decisions.summary: No DNO earth at this rural site.
decisions.rule: Ontology TT entry permitted for INT

sections.title: Main Earthing Terminal
sections.summary: MET in service intake cupboard, NW corner. 10 mm² Cu main earthing conductor to the electrode array.

decisions.label: 10 mm² main earthing conductor
decisions.summary: Minimum per IEC 60364-5-54 for an installation electrode connection.

sections.title: Electrodes
sections.summary: Two 1.5 m driven rods in parallel target a combined Ra ≤ 100 Ω in loam (assumed soil resistivity 100 Ω·m). Tool call calc.electrode_resistance is declared but deferred; engineer-input Ra accepted with tool_call_pending=true.

decisions.label: Two-rod parallel arrangement
decisions.summary: Single rod at this site estimated ~150Ω; halving via parallel meets the 100Ω target.

sections.title: Main Bonding
sections.summary: Single main bond from MET to the external LPG fuel pipe (the only extraneous-conductive-part).

decisions.label: 10 mm² bond to LPG fuel pipe
decisions.summary: Sized per IEC 60364-5-54 Clause 544 typical default 10 mm².

sections.title: Supplementary Bonding
sections.summary: No supplementary bonding zones declared. Bathroom is dry, basin-only — no separate bonding zone.

sections.title: CPC + Zs Verification
sections.summary: CPCs sized per IEC 60364-5-54 Table 54.2 (equal to phase CSA for the small sizes used here). Zs verification uses RCD ADS path (Ra·IΔn ≤ 50 V) since TT cannot meet disconnection time on overcurrent alone.

decisions.label: CPCs from Table 54.2
decisions.summary: Domestic small-circuit wiring — table method appropriate.

decisions.label: Ra·IΔn ≤ 50 V check
decisions.summary: With Ra=100Ω and IΔn=30mA → 3 V ≪ 50 V.

sections.title: RCD Requirements
sections.summary: All three circuits 30 mA RCBO-protected. TT system mandates RCD on every final circuit per IEC 60364-4-41 411.5.3.

sections.title: Compliance
sections.summary: Fully compliant. No non-compliance flags. One TOOL-CALL-PENDING flag for the electrode resistance calc.

sections.title: Assumptions
sections.summary: Three assumptions captured: soil resistivity (loam typical), engineer-input Ra accepted, and semi-infinite rod formula for array combination.
